context: Tests whether the RealityKit skill prevents conflating entity hit testing with ARKit real-world surface raycasts.

checklist.name: Entity hit-test boundary
checklist.description: Explains that RealityViewCameraContent.hitTest intersects RealityKit entity collision shapes, not arbitrary detected physical surfaces.

checklist.name: Camera ray limitation
checklist.description: States that RealityViewCameraContent.ray produces a camera ray in RealityKit coordinates and is not by itself proof of a real-world surface hit.

checklist.name: Plane anchor path
checklist.description: Recommends AnchorEntity(.plane(...)) for simple placement on detected horizontal or vertical planes.

checklist.name: ARKit raycast path
checklist.description: Recommends ARRaycastQuery with ARSession.raycast(_:) and AnchorEntity(raycastResult:) when a one-shot real-world surface intersection is needed.

checklist.name: Collision component scope
checklist.description: Uses CollisionComponent shapes for interactive entity hit testing and gestures, not as a substitute for ARKit surface detection.
